title: docs: update GPU instances inventory to Vast.ai
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: Mapping the new hardware
gist.blurb: Updated our internal maps to point to the shiny new Vast.ai GPU instances. 11x RTX 5090s and an H200 are now officially on the books.
gist.summary: Updated the internal GPU instance documentation to reflect the migration from io.net to Vast.ai.
gist.impact: Maintainers now have accurate SSH access, environment variables, and cost estimates for the active RTX 5090 and H200 instances.
gist.visual_concept: The bee mascot (Polly) wearing a tiny hard hat, inspecting a glowing server rack or a map of servers. The robot companion holding a clipboard. Lots of glowing green lights representing the new RTX 5090s.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny yellow hard hat, inspecting a glowing retro server rack with the chunky monitor robot holding a clipboard. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny yellow hard hat, inspecting a glowing retro server rack with the chunky monitor robot holding a clipboard.
